title: It's me!
text:
Hello! My name is Alex, and I am eleven years old. I wake up at 7 o'clock every day. I get dressed quickly, have breakfast and go to school. Right now, I am reading a cool comic book in my room. I love hanging out with my friends after school.

Last weekend, I went to the cinema with my best friend. We watched a fantastic superhero movie and ate a lot of popcorn. It was great! I also look after my pet dog, Rex. He is very funny. Tomorrow, I will help my dad clean up the garage.

I usually do my homework in the evening, and then I go to bed. In the future, I will travel around the world. I will become a famous game designer. I am playing a new video game at the moment, and it gives me great ideas! I am happy and I love my life.

title: My school
text:
I study at School Number 50. It is a big and bright building. Every morning, I go to school with my friends. We get on very well with each other. I also like to read books in the school library.

Right now, we are having a break. My classmates are talking and laughing in the corridor. I am sitting on a sofa and looking at my phone. Yesterday, we had a great History lesson. Our teacher showed us an interesting documentary. We learned a lot of new facts! After the lesson, we handed in our essays.

Next week, we will take part in a school sports competition. I will run in a relay race. I am sure our team will win! I really look forward to our school trips. Last year, we went to the local museum. It was awesome. I love my school because I can find out new things every day and grow up with my best friends.

title: My city - Chelyabinsk
text:
I live in Chelyabinsk. It is a large and beautiful city in the Ural Mountains. There are many interesting places to visit here. Right now, it is autumn. The leaves are falling from the trees, and people are walking in Gorky Park.

I often walk around Kirovka street with my family. We look at the funny bronze statues and eat delicious ice cream. Last summer, I climbed Taganay Hill. It was hard, but the view was amazing! We took lots of photos.

At the weekend, my parents and I will go to the Chelyabinsk Meteorite museum. I will find out more about the famous space rock. In the evening, I usually hang out at the local playground, go to the cinema or just chill out at home. I love my city very much. It is the best place to grow up!

title: Russia is my country
text:
Russia is my Motherland. It is the largest country in the world! It is so big that you can travel around it for a long time. People here are very friendly and kind.

Right now, winter is coming. In some cities, it is snowing, and children are making snowmen. I am sitting by the window and looking at the white snow. Last year, my family and I travelled to Moscow. We went to the Red Square and looked for cool souvenirs. We had a wonderful time.

Next summer, we will set off for the south. We will swim in the sea and will eat fresh fruit. I love Russian nature. We must take care of our forests and rivers. When I grow up, I will explore the beautiful Lake Baikal. I am proud that I was born in Russia. It is a great country with a rich history!
